summary: Full e2e testing of PAL Institute MVP. 18/18 backend pytest assertions passed against the public preview URL. All critical frontend flows verified: landing page, header/CTAs, Enquire preselect, consent validation (exact string match), demo form submission with success modal + WhatsApp popup + toast, admin login (wrong+correct), dashboard charts, status dropdown update, topper CRUD, CSV export button, logout, Terms/Privacy routes, mobile hamburger, phone 10-digit sanitization. No _id leaks in any API response.

issues:
Content is present but uses

tags rather than

  • bullets as mentioned in spec 'all content bullets'. Not a functional blocker.

action_items: (Optional) Spec mentions admin tab data-testids 'admin-tab-dashboard' and 'admin-tab-results', but actual testids are 'admin-tab-overview' and 'admin-tab-toppers'. Functional but may confuse future tests. Consider aligning or updating spec.
(Optional) Terms and Privacy pages could use <ul><li> bulleted lists for better readability, currently using paragraphs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~380 lines): Admin tokens stored in-memory set ADMIN_TOKENS — acceptable per context note, but all tokens invalidate on backend restart. Consider documenting this or using short-lived JWTs if horizontal scaling is added.
server.py: admin_login has no rate limiting — brute-force protection could be added if exposed publicly.
server.py: CSV export and dashboard both load up to 5000 documents into memory; fine for MVP scale but consider streaming/aggregation at higher volumes.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection {"_id": 0} — verified no leaks across 4 admin list endpoints and public toppers endpoint.
Consent validation error string is identical across bookings/enquiries/scholarship backend and frontend — good consistency.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 TEST_-prefixed demo bookings/enquiries/scholarship/topper records during testing. These persist in MongoDB pal_institute DB. Can be cleaned via admin UI or mongo shell if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest + requests, 18 tests, run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env). Admin testids: admin-tab-{overview|bookings|enquiries|scholarship|toppers}. Demo form testids: field-{student-name|parent-name|phone|email|student-class|program|date|timing|source|questions|consent}, demo-submit-btn, consent-error, success-modal. WhatsApp window.open triggers on demo submit success. Consent message string (must match exactly): 'Please accept the consent, Terms & Conditions, and Privacy Policy to continue.'
rca of the issue: No bugs identified. All acceptance criteria met.
